title: Publication stream-order style
description: A hydrology-focused line-style fixture and style preset for visualizing headwaters, tributaries, and mainstem rivers by stream order/upstream area.
author: AI-Hydro Team
license: Public domain source data unless otherwise noted; AI-Hydro manifest metadata CC-BY-4.0
citation: AI-Hydro Research Gallery style preset; stream-order styling convention derived from common hydrography cartography.
importWarnings: Imports a small style-fixture GeoJSON now; the companion stream-order-style.json documents the intended symbology preset.
